irregularities.label: IMPLICIT_AGGREGATION_ROWS
irregularities.details: The "total" rows represent overall values that could be calculated from the corresponding "weekday" and "weekend" rows above them.

irregularities.label: SPARSE_ROW_FILL
irregularities.evidence: Column 0 has values filled at block starts for "screen time", "sedentary time", "lpa", and "mvpa", with blanks in between for subcategories.
irregularities.details: The dimension column does not have values filled for every data observation, only at the start of each category block.
